name: input-otp
description: Segmented one-time-code input — N visual segments over a single hidden real input, with paste distribution, auto-advance, backspace-back, and a fire-once complete event

input.description: The single real text input. Transparent and stretched over the segments, it owns focus, typing, paste, selection and mobile SMS autofill. Carries the accessible name, autocomplete="one-time-code", inputmode and maxlength.

segments.description: Decorative row that visually mirrors the input's value. Marked aria-hidden because the real input is the accessible control.

segment.description: One visual cell per character. The controller reflects data-filled, data-active and data-caret onto these; count is reconciled to data-length at init.

mode.description: numeric = digits only (inputmode="numeric", pattern="[0-9]*"); alphanumeric = letters + digits (inputmode="text"). Illegal characters are silently dropped on type and paste.

length.description: Number of segments / code length (clamped 1–12). Authoritative: the controller rebuilds the segment row to match.

value.description: Initial code; seeded silently (no complete event) at init

keyboard.0-9 / a-z: type a character into the caret segment; focus auto-advances
keyboard.Backspace: delete the character before the caret; on an empty trailing segment the caret moves to the previous (filled) segment
keyboard.Delete: delete the character at the caret
keyboard.ArrowLeft: move the caret one segment toward the start
keyboard.ArrowRight: move the caret one segment toward the end
keyboard.Home: move the caret to the first segment
keyboard.End: move the caret to the last filled segment
keyboard.Paste: distribute the pasted characters from the caret, dropping any that don't fit the mode

notes: Single real input, not one input per segment: a single labelled field announces cleanly to screen readers, lets the browser handle paste at the caret, and lets iOS/Android surface SMS codes via autocomplete="one-time-code".
The segment row is aria-hidden — it is purely presentational.
aria-invalid="true" on the root reflects an error state onto the segments.

faqir:change.description: Fires on every value change with the current (possibly partial) code

faqir:complete.description: Fires exactly once when the code becomes full; re-armed only after the value drops below full again

api.setValue: (str) => void — set the value silently (no change/complete event)
api.destroy: () => void — remove listeners and the private handle
